evals.name: responsive-card-grid
evals.prompt: The property listing page shows all cards in a single column on tablet viewports. Fix it to use a 2-column grid on tablet (md breakpoint) and 3-column on desktop (lg). The component is in frontend/src/pages/propiedades.rs.

assertions.text: Uses Tailwind responsive breakpoints (md: and lg: prefixes)
Applies grid-cols-2 at md and grid-cols-3 at lg
Works within Leptos view! macro syntax
Does not break existing card component structure

evals.name: accessibility-form-labels
evals.prompt: The tenant creation form is missing labels and aria attributes. Add proper accessible labels to all form inputs, associate them with for/id pairs, and add aria-required for mandatory fields.

assertions.text: Adds <label> elements with for attributes matching input ids
Adds aria-required='true' on mandatory fields (nombre, apellido, cedula)
Uses Leptos view! macro syntax correctly
Labels are in Spanish matching the product domain
Does not remove existing form functionality
